message:
feat(daemon): Complete daemon module with resource monitoring

Add missing resource.rs and mod.rs to complete the daemon module:

src/daemon/resource.rs:
- ResourceMonitor for tracking process memory usage
- apply_nice() for CPU priority (nice values)
- apply_ionice() for I/O priority scheduling
- Linux-specific /proc/self/statm memory tracking
- Human-readable memory formatting
- Comprehensive tests for all resource monitoring

src/daemon/mod.rs:
- Module organization and re-exports
- Architecture documentation
- Wire-compatible protocol with xf

The daemon module now provides:
- Unix Domain Socket server (core.rs)
- Client with auto-spawn (client.rs)
- Lazy model loading (models.rs)
- MessagePack protocol (protocol.rs)
- Resource monitoring (resource.rs)

All 39 daemon tests pass.

Part of coding_agent_session_search-1b9z: Warm Model Daemon Architecture

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,55 @@
+//! Semantic model daemon for warm embedding and reranking.
+//!
+//! This module provides a daemon server that keeps ML models resident in memory
+//! for fast inference. The daemon:
+//! - Listens on a Unix Domain Socket for requests
+//! - Shares the socket with xf (wire-compatible protocol)
+//! - First-come spawns, others connect
+//! - Supports graceful fallback to direct inference
+//!
+//! ## Architecture
+//!
+//! ```text
+//! ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
+//! │                    WIRE-COMPATIBLE DAEMONS                      │
+//! ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
+//! │  xf (standalone)           cass (standalone)                   │
+//! │  ┌──────────────┐          ┌──────────────┐                    │
+//! │  │ xf binary    │          │ cass binary  │                    │
+//! │  │  └─ daemon   │          │  └─ daemon   │                    │
+//! │  └──────────────┘          └──────────────┘                    │
+//! │         │ Same socket path: /tmp/semantic-daemon-$USER.sock    │
+//! │         ▼                         ▼                            │
+//! │  ┌────────────────────────────────────────┐                    │
+//! │  │  Shared UDS Socket (first-come wins)   │                    │
+//! │  └────────────────────────────────────────┘                    │
+//! └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
+//! ```
+//!
+//! ## Usage
+//!
+//! ```ignore
+//! use cass::daemon::{client::UdsDaemonClient, core::ModelDaemon};
+//!
+//! // Client usage (auto-spawns daemon if not running)
+//! let client = UdsDaemonClient::with_defaults();
+//! client.connect()?;
+//! let embeddings = client.embed(&["hello world"])?;
+//!
+//! // Server usage (for daemon subprocess)
+//! let daemon = ModelDaemon::with_defaults(&data_dir);
+//! daemon.run()?;
+//! ```
+
+pub mod client;
+pub mod core;
+pub mod models;
+pub mod protocol;
+pub mod resource;
+
+// Re-export key types for convenience
+pub use client::{DaemonClientConfig, UdsDaemonClient};
+pub use core::{DaemonConfig, ModelDaemon};
+pub use models::ModelManager;
+pub use protocol::{Request, Response, PROTOCOL_VERSION, default_socket_path};
+pub use resource::ResourceMonitor;
